title: Repository Architecture & Component Map
summary: Comprehensive map of all frontend components, backend API routes, AI agents, and actuarial models in the Reserving-using-Agentic-AI platform. Covers frontend-to-backend API mappings, agent roles (deterministic vs LLM-powered), the 8 actuarial methods, the sequential ingestion pipeline, the in-memory session store structure, and the full tech stack. Includes Mermaid diagrams for architecture, workflow, and agent mapping.
